description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CMake that runs on every push. The workflow should have two jobs: build-windows and build-linux. The build-windows job should run on a windows-2019 environment, create a build directory, configure CMake for Win32 and x64 architectures, build, and test. The build-linux job should run on an ubuntu-20.04 environment, create a build directory, install cross compilers, configure CMake for multiple Linux architectures, build, and test.
